overall.description: Gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character in green robes approaching and entering the Three Broomsticks inn in a medieval village setting. The character transitions from the sunlit cobblestone street into the dimly lit, Victorian-decorated interior, exploring rooms with antique furniture and draped curtains.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone village street approaching timber-framed inn entrance

events.description: character opens large wooden doors and steps inside the Three Broomsticks inn

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path toward the inn entrance, ascending the stone steps to the wooden doors

notable_agents.action: group of villagers standing on the stone stairs to the right of the entrance

entered.detail: timber-framed fantasy inn with steep gabled roof and ornate wooden beams
uneven grey cobblestones forming the village pathway
weathered stone steps leading up to the entrance landing
large carved wooden double doors with metal ring handles

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Three Broomsticks inn along a sunlit cobblestone street in a medieval fantasy village. Villagers stand on the stairs to the right as the character walks toward the large wooden entrance doors and enters the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy inn interior with Victorian decor, velvet curtains, and antique furnishings

events.description: transition from bright outdoor sunlight to softer interior lighting with warm window light
passing through heavy velvet curtains into the back dining area of the inn

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior rooms, examining the antique decor, passing a piano and paintings, and approaching an NPC in the back area

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt standing near the back dining tables
villager entering the room from a doorway on the right side

entered.detail: vintage gramophone with brass horn on wooden table near the entrance
heavy red drapes hanging in doorways between rooms
dark wooden piano against the left wall with sheet music stand
framed portraits in ornate gold frames hanging on patterned wallpaper
long rustic wooden tables with benches in the back dining area
tall wooden bookcase filled with books against the back wall
low wooden cabinet with decorative items and framed photos on top

segments.scene_description: Inside the Three Broomsticks inn, the character explores rooms with warm natural light filtering through draped windows. The space features antique furniture including a phonograph, piano, and oil paintings. The character passes through velvet curtains into a back dining area with wooden tables, where NPCs are present, and continues toward a wooden cabinet and wardrobe area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open village street into the intimate, antique-filled interior of a medieval inn. It begins with the character walking along a sunlit cobblestone path past villagers on nearby stairs, moving steadily toward the large wooden entrance doors of the Three Broomsticks. As the character crosses the threshold, the bright daylight shifts into a warm, indoor glow where natural light filters through draped windows and illuminates a room filled with oil paintings, a piano, and a phonograph. The scene then flows through heavy velvet curtains into a back dining area populated by NPCs at wooden tables, before finally gliding toward a quiet corner featuring a wooden cabinet and wardrobe.
